items.title: Revenue and demand forecasting
items.description: Retail and logistics teams predict continuous sales volume or revenue from historical features — regression when the business needs a numeric forecast, not just up/down.

items.title: Credit and fraud decisions
items.description: Banks classify transactions or applications as approve/deny or fraud/legitimate — binary classification with threshold tuning on predicted risk probability.

items.title: Medical diagnosis support
items.description: Radiology and pathology models classify scans as disease present/absent or assign one of several conditions — discrete labels drive triage workflows.

items.title: Dynamic pricing
items.description: E-commerce platforms regress optimal price or expected conversion value on product and context features when the output must be a dollar amount.

items.title: Document and image tagging
items.description: Multi-class classifiers assign one topic per article or one object category per image; multi-label variants tag several attributes per item.

items.title: LLM safety and intent routing
items.description: Fine-tuned classifiers route user prompts to handlers (billing, technical, abuse) or flag policy violations — discrete routing decisions built on classification heads.
